raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a bed from the company. On their returns page on their website it showed free cancellation in the first 4 weeks. The page very specially calls out cancellations. The company informed me that that page was out of date and their policy had changed and that they would charge me 8 % for the return. I sent both the posted returns page and the email chain with the company acknowledging the error and the bank refused the dispute
